12.topics: Types of relations: Reflexive, Symmetric, Transitive and Equivalence relations. One to one and onto functions, Composite functions, Inverse of a function.
Definition, Range, Domain, Principal value branch. Graphs of inverse trigonometric functions. Elementary properties of inverse trigonometric functions.

Concept, notation, order, equality, types of matrices. Operation on matrices. Determinant of a square matrix (up to 3x3), properties, Adjoint and Inverse of a matrix. Solving linear equations using Matrix Method.

Continuity and Differentiability, Chain Rule, Derivatives of Inverse Trigo, Logarithmic Differentiation. Integration as inverse of differentiation, Integration by substitution, by parts and partial fractions. Definite Integrals and their properties.

Vectors and scalars, magnitude and direction. Direction cosines and ratios. Dot product and Cross product. Direction cosines/ratios of a line joining two points. Cartesian and Vector equation of a line, Coplanar and Skew lines, Shortest distance. Equation of a plane.

LPP: Introduction, related terminology such as constraints, objective function, optimization. Conditional Probability, Multiplication theorem, Independent events, Bayes' theorem, Random variable and its probability distribution.

11.topics: Sets and their representations. Empty set, Finite & Infinite sets, Subsets, Power set, Universal set. Venn diagrams. Union and Intersection of sets. Difference of sets. Complement of a set.
Positive and negative angles. Measuring angles in radians and in degrees. Signs of trigonometric functions. Sum and difference identities. General solution of trigonometric equations.
Need for complex numbers, square root of a negative number. Argand plane and polar representation. Linear Inequalities. Permutations and Combinations. Binomial Theorem. Sequence and Series (AP & GP).
Straight Lines (Slope, Various forms of equations). Conic Sections: Sections of a cone: Circle, Ellipse, Parabola, Hyperbola. Introduction to Three-dimensional Geometry.
Measures of Dispersion: Range, Mean deviation, variance and standard deviation of ungrouped/grouped data. Probability: Random experiments, outcomes, sample spaces. Axiomatic probability.

10.topics: Real Numbers: Fundamental Theorem of Arithmetic. Polynomials: Zeros of a polynomial. Pair of Linear Equations in Two Variables. Quadratic Equations: Standard form, Nature of roots. Arithmetic Progressions: nth term and sum of n terms.
Introduction to Trigonometry: Ratios of acute angles. Trigonometric Identities: sin²A + cos²A = 1. Heights and Distances: Angle of elevation, Angle of depression.
Triangles: Similarity of triangles, BPT. Circles: Tangents to a circle at point of contact. Area Related to Circles.
Surface Areas and Volumes: Combinations of solids (Cylinder, Cone, Sphere). Statistics: Mean, Median and Mode of grouped data. Probability: Classical definition, simple problems.

9.topics: Rational and Irrational numbers. Real numbers and their decimal expansions. Remainder Theorem, Factor Theorem. Algebraic Identities: (a+b+c)², (a+b)³, etc.
Cartesian plane, coordinates of a point. Linear Equations in Two Variables: Graph of linear equations, solutions.
Lines and Angles, Triangles (Congruence rules: SAS, ASA, SSS, RHS). Quadrilaterals: Properties of Parallelogram. Circles: Equal chords and their distances.
Heron's Formula: Area of a triangle. Surface Areas and Volumes: Cube, Cuboids, Spheres, Cones, Cylinders.

8.topics: Properties of Rational Numbers. Linear Equations in One Variable. Understanding Quadrilaterals: Polygons, Parallelograms, Rhombus, Square.
Organizing Data: Bar graphs, Pie charts. Squares and Square Roots. Cubes and Cube Roots.
Comparing Quantities: Percentage, Profit and Loss, Discount, Sales Tax. Compound Interest formula and applications.
Algebraic Expressions and Identities. Mensuration: Area of Trapezium, General Quadrilateral. Surface Area and Volume of Cube and Cylinder.
Powers with negative exponents. Laws of exponents. Direct and Inverse Proportions.
